name: Nova Shield
description: Nova shields detonate when their capacity hits zero, releasing an elemental burst around you that damages nearby enemies. They suit close-range builds that stay in the middle of the fight and can turn shield breaks into crowd damage or quick Second Wind setups.
notes: A nova cannot trigger again until the shield has fully recharged, so recharge delay, recharge rate, and your ability to stay near enemies all determine how often it pays off.

special.description: On shield break, it releases an elemental nova that damages nearby enemies.
